videos.headline: Florida Gators vs. Miami Hurricanes: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Florida Gators vs. Miami Hurricanes: Full Highlights) 2025/09/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: Florida drops heart breaker to in-state rival No. 4 Miami
videos.description: The Gators struggle to get the ball moving offensively as they are held to 141 total yards in their 26-7 loss to the Canes.
